description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

We're hosting four lectures on frailty prevention: exercise, nutrition, oral health, and dementia prevention. Schedules vary by district.

【Soyanagi District Administrative Center】10:00–11:00
• October 9, 2026 (Friday) – Dementia prevention lecture
• November 6, 2026 (Friday) – Nutrition lecture
• December 11, 2026 (Friday) – Oral health lecture
• February 12, 2027 (Friday) – Exercise lecture
Registration: Community Health Support Center Sakae-cho, 042-971-3172

【Kaji District Administrative Center】14:00–15:00
• December 9, 2026 (Wednesday) – Dementia prevention lecture
• December 23, 2026 (Wednesday) – Exercise lecture
• January 13, 2027 (Wednesday) – Oral health lecture
• January 27, 2027 (Wednesday) – Nutrition lecture
Registration: Community Health Support Center Minami-cho, 042-978-5777

【Higashi-Agano District Administrative Center】10:00–11:00
• June 11, 2026 (Thursday) – Dementia prevention lecture
• September 10, 2026 (Thursday) – Oral health lecture
• October 8, 2026 (Thursday) – Nutrition lecture
• February 25, 2027 (Thursday) – Exercise lecture
Registration: Community Health Support Center Hachiman-cho, 042-975-3011

【Haraichiiba Welfare Center】14:00–15:00
• May 13, 2026 (Wednesday) – Dementia prevention lecture
• May 27, 2026 (Wednesday) – Oral health lecture
• June 10, 2026 (Wednesday) – Nutrition lecture
• June 24, 2026 (Wednesday) – Exercise lecture
Registration: Community Health Support Center Inari-cho, 042-980-5043

Registration opens one month before each lecture. Please bring: writing utensil, drinking water, glasses (if needed). For exercise lectures: face towel and comfortable clothing and shoes for exercise.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/kaigofukushika/ninchi-sisaku/ninchi-jigyou/7983.html
summary: ℹ️ Everyone's Healthy Body Project – Four frailty prevention lectures (exercise, nutrition, oral health, dementia prevention) at different locations and dates.
